artifact.label: LLM_REFLECTION
artifact.text: LLM_REFLECTION: The directional short call was right on an absolute basis as price faded toward the exit, though the trade realized a -0.0727% alpha because underlying market momentum outpaced the position's decay window. The standalone fade mechanics held technically, but relative performance failed as the buy-and-hold benchmark's drift exceeded the short's capture range. Future gate signals should incorporate a pre-entry trend-strength threshold to restrict fade deployment to environments with demonstrably weak follow-through, helping ensure directional accuracy consistently converts to positive relative returns.
